author: ellie
review: absolutely love the environment and the people! such a great place to live. everyone is loving and accepting and the staff does everything they can to help at any point!

ownerResponse.text: We really appreciate this day-making insight, Ellie - thank you for your joy and positivity! We will always do what we can for our community. :)

author: Draegon Moss
review: Great if you have mommys/daddys money. The rent is pretty steep, they charge an outrageous amount for parking in the garage, currently going for $350 each month on top of rent. Street parking is awful and there are times I have to drive

ownerResponse.text: Draegon, thank you for taking the time to thoroughly review Stateside and your time with us. We apologize for the negative experiences you have had during your time here, particularly with the parking and cleanliness. We take all feedback seriously and will take steps to address these issues. Additionally, we will work on improving our customer service and communication with prospective tenants. Thank you for bringing these issues to our attention. If you would like to discuss any further concerns or go deeper into anything mentioned here, please do not hesitate to reach out to us at (360) 762-3972.

author: Manpreet Singh
review: Really nice luxury apartments which I have never seen for students before. I stayed here in Summer as a sublet and really enjoyed the location. Good gym and internet amenities.

ownerResponse.text: We appreciate your feedback about the property in the time that you'd spent with us, Manpreet. We're happy to go over any aspects of the community's location and what we're adjacent to if folks have questions following your review! Washington has a fairly standard "no AC" in apartment buildings, but we do apologize if that was a surprise to you and not previously discussed. If there are any lingering questions you have about any of the move-out charges you incur when taking on a sublet, we're here for you! Thanks so much for the review and your time, Manpreet.

author: Mason Woolbright
review: If you have a car DO NOT MOVER HERE you will spend 30 minutes or MORE looking for a parking spot. If you dont want to pay the $400 a month for gated parking. The people who work here are rellly nice tho

ownerResponse.text: Mason - thank you for your review and perspective. We're sorry to hear that you've had a negative experience with parking at Stateside. We understand that parking can be challenging in urban areas, and that's birthed the offer of gated parking for our residents after concerns like this one. We would be happy to discuss this option with you further if you are interested - please feel free to reach out to us at your convenience.

author: Carolyn Puppikerz
review: Have heard about serious rent gouging and Im moving in this summer so I hope to god it isnt true. If it is the people running it need to take a look at themselves and see that they are trying to take unnecessary money from poor college

ownerResponse.text: Carolyn - thank you for presenting your concerns as you enter our community. We are more than happy to discuss our lease pricing for various units and what you can come to expect when moving into Stateside, as well as a full breakdown of what goes into the ledger. We are well aware that this area of town has rapidly increased in competitive pricing and would like to know more of what you expect. Please give us a call today or next week and we can continue our chat there. Thanks again for your time.

author: Laura Lott
review: Really disappointed with this place!!! How are you going to tell your residents to leave up their LED lights because your maintenance crew will take them down safely but still charge for the damage that your maintenance crew caused? We have

ownerResponse.text: Hi, Laura. We apologize about your daughters experience concerning the lights, and invite you to please contact us if you have any further questions. Wed be happy to explain our maintenance process at Stateside in more detail.

author: Jared Dirks
review: I can only speak to my experience at Stateside, but from what I have heard from others who I met while living there I can say there is generally some things I can comment on confidently.

ownerResponse.text: Jared - thank you for organizing your thoughts and experience in a review for us and others to evaluate. We want to apologize for the frustrating elements surrounding your experience, namely the closing of amenities while assessing the situations created and the laundry machines being repaired. We are fully functional in both of these areas as of now, and laundry is free as of this lease term. Any questions about move-out charges can be directed to manager@statesidebellingham.com, as we do not dodge conversations about them, we are only able to address complaints in writing and we apologize if that wasn't clear. If there are any questions related to the lease agreement or payment structure, as well as safety/security protocol on site, we are more than happy to discuss them in-office or over the phone. Again, thank you for your full perspective Jared.

author: Taylor
review: Great apartment! Love it so much, but the rent and parking is increasing to an unrealistic amount. My roomates and I cant afford the new prices.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for the great and honest feedback, Taylor. Always happy to facilitate any discussion related to pricing and leasing if you'd like to chat about it this week or after the holidays! Thanks again for your review.

author: Shayn Sath
review: When I first heard about stateside I knew the name had a meaning behind it. A beautiful big 2 building structure with AMAZING views of the bay and the city. Had the opportunity to take a tour in January and walking into the very first unit

author: Kashmere Carr
review: Super excited to move in next month!! Everyone is so sweet and helpful, especially the leasing manager Lindsay Fulford. I did a virtual tour of the building with her, and just WOW. Ive lived in my fair share of homes and apartments, and

author: Kristofferson Family
review: From a parent's perspective so far so good.  Everything we have needed to do with Kasee and Lindsay as been so smooth.  Quick response to ALL of my many questions and very professional.  I hope this is an indicator of how our son's

author: Lindsay Fulford
review: It can be difficult to find student housing that checks off all the boxes like Stateside does. You are right where you need to be with all the popular shops and restaurants, WWU, and the South Bay Trail only minutes away on foot. As part of

author: Dylan Wilding
review: Now that they have residents living here, they are beginning to price gouge. Parking prices are going up 300%-600% in a single year, and I'm assuming apartment prices will go up as well too. What a shame, because the apartments themselves

author: Teagan Jones
review: The folks at Stateside have made my first apartment experience a breeze. I seriously could not have asked for a more helpful team in this new process for me. These guys are great, helpful, and beyond kind. On top of amazing staff, Stateside is BEAUTIFUL. I am ecstatic to call this place my new home.

author: Shelby Felthoven
review: I recently signed my lease with stateside and I am ecstatic to move in. Everyone at stateside has been extremely helpful and made the process fast and easy. The apartments are beautiful with great views and a great staff and I cant wait to move in when they open up!

author: Ruby Donaldson
review: I toured stateside and it was amazing. I have already signed my lease but I wanted to see the buildings in person, everyone was so helpful and answered all my questions! They have free laundry and a community kitchen that is so spacious. I can't wait to move in.

author: Emerson Sullivan
review: Lindsay was very helpful and friendly working with her and the building looks beautiful! The fact that there is a bagel shop and fitness center on site is a huge plus. By far the greatest deal I could find in Bellingham for the  amenities and building.

author: Carly Spradlin
review: Hey there! I'm a CA at Stateside Bellingham, started here a couple of months ago.

author: Lillie Adamson
review: I love stateside! Everyone is so friendly and the rent is reasonable. Some of the apartments have funny layouts, but they are all furnished and pretty high quality.

author: Sophia Collins
review: Stateside is a brand new & absolutely beautiful student housing community in Bellingham. If youre on the housing hunt, give us a call- we are here to help make this process super fun and easy for yall!

author: Kasee Castro
review: Ownership and management come from experienced backgrounds and exceptional customer service. Excited to see this community come to the Bellingham market for students looking to elevate their housing experience!

author: Dennis Alexandrow
review: I love it here at stateside! The building is beautiful inside and out and the perfect distance from campus, making it very convenient for students!

author: Charlie Schmid
review: So clean and crazy modern. Best student housing for Western HANDS DOWN. 2 minute drive and 12 minute walk to campus.

author: Ava Martin
review: Stateside Apartments make me feel right at home! I love the amenities and I love how close it is to down town.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for the love and great review, Ava!

author: Gabriel Grant
review: There has been a lot of care and attention put into creating a great environment for residents, both in terms of great spaces and amenities as well as excellent management.

author: Irena Kolbert
review: Very beautiful rooms and great location. The views are nice, and its super close to WWU.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for this beautiful sentiment Irena. We are so glad you're enjoying Stateside for its location and views!

author: eduardo castro
review: Just moved in, loving my new apartment awesome views ;) and great location.. Staff made moving in a breeze. I think I made the right choice!

author: Nathan Shamseldin
review: This place looks absolutely amazing! From the views to the culture Id give it a solid 10/10. Shout out to Sophia for the awesome tour!

author: Karla Hernandez
review: The Stateside team was extremely helpful when I was applying. The units look gorgeous and I cant wait to move in!

author: Mackenzie Mast
review: Our team is super excited to bring great new student-focused apartments and retail to Bellingham!

author: P D S
review: I am being charged continuously for electricity even when I am not living there anymore.

ownerResponse.text: Hey there - we're sorry that you're experiencing some trouble with the financial aspect of things. We're fairly certain the charges you're seeing are from the last two months, but in the event they're not, give us a call at (360) 946-0820 and we can sort it out together. Thanks for reaching out!

author: Cooper Bronson
review: Been living here for a bit now and the staff are great, super helpful and always friendly!

author: Fernando Gonzalez
review: Great Future student and local housing, great view of the Bay Area!

author: Daniel Ivanov
review: Fixed issues I had quickly and without hassle.

author: Jillian Marie
review: would rate lower if i could.

ownerResponse.text: Jillian, we are so sorry for the frustrations you've encountered with getting your rent paid. We understand that you spoke with our GM Laura yesterday about this situation and the late fee reversal, and we will update you at any point if the check doesn't clear this time around. Again, we do not wish this situation upon any resident and hope that this will be the last time we have to deal with this together.
